services.name: Customized Sustainable Weight Loss Plans
services.description: Unlike crash diets, our plans focus on metabolic correction, hormonal balance (PCOS, thyroid), and lifestyle modification.

services.name: Cryolipolysis (Fat Freezing)
services.description: Non-surgical inch loss using advanced fat-freezing technology to permanently destroy fat cells in stubborn areas.

services.name: Acne & Acne Scar Treatment
services.description: Root-cause analysis with customized medication, scar revision therapies, and pigmentation correction.

services.name: Carbon Laser Facial
services.description: A deep-cleansing laser procedure that reduces pigmentation, minimizes pores, and provides an instant glow.

services.name: PRP Therapy (Platelet-Rich Plasma)
services.description: A regenerative treatment stimulating dormant hair follicles to improve thickness and promote natural regrowth.

services.name: Cupping Therapy
services.description: Traditional therapy for PCOS management, stress relief, detoxification, and improving blood circulation.
